markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 223. Bids & Contracts for Highway Projects
##### § 223.207 — Liability for Private Obligations

The department may not incur a financial obligation for a private entity that designs, develops, finances, constructs, maintains, or operates a state highway or other facility under this subchapter. The state or a political subdivision of the state is not liable for any financial or other obligations of a project solely because a private entity constructs, finances, or operates any part of the project.

*Added by Acts 2005, 79th Leg., Ch. 281 (H.B.2702), Sec. 2.21, eff. June 14, 2005.*
